description_long: This is a dark, life-sized bust sculpture of a mature man, rendered with realistic facial features and textured hair. The figure is depicted from the shoulders up, wearing a collared shirt and jacket, and is mounted on a rectangular plinth. The surface of the sculpture is rough and matte, with visible tool marks that add to its expressive quality. The facial expression is calm and dignified, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and slightly parted lips. The back of the head and neck are also detailed, showing the contours of the hair and collar. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or portrait sculpture, likely cast in bronze or a similar metal.
description: A dark, textured bust of a mature man in a collared shirt and jacket, mounted on a rectangular base. The sculpture features realistic facial details and a rough, expressive surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's detailed facial features, including deep-set eyes, nose, and mouth, as well as the collar and upper chest.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the textured hair, ear, and the side of the face, with the collar and shoulder visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, neck, and jacket collar, with detailed hair texture.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite side of the face, ear, and the jacket's shoulder.
attribute_subject_matter: portrait bust of a mature man
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
